items.title: Surveillance Accountability Act Introduced
items.body: The Surveillance Accountability Act (H.R. 8470) was introduced in Congress on April 23, 2026. This bill is currently in the early stages of the legislative process and will be reviewed by committee before potentially moving to the House or Senate for further consideration.

items.title: SECURE Data Act Raises Privacy Issues
items.body: The SECURE Data Act proposes new protections for data privacy but has been criticized for lacking enforcement mechanisms. Critics argue that it could be 'worse than no standard at all' due to its limitations on individual rights and opt-out capabilities.

items.title: OpenAI's New Compliance Tools
items.body: OpenAI has launched a Compliance API that provides visibility into agent configurations and usage patterns, aimed at enhancing compliance for enterprises. This tool is part of a broader effort to ensure safer AI deployments.
